scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules bun.lock && bun run web:clean
scripts.web:dev: bun run web:fmt && bun run web:chk && cd apps/web && bun run dev
scripts._service:dev: bun run service:fmt && bun run service:chk && cd apps/service && bun run dev
scripts.web:restart: bun run reinstall && bun run web:dev
scripts._service:restart: bun run reinstall && bun run service:dev
